heading: Moratoria on imports of exotic birds covered by Convention
label: 4904 Moratoria on imports of exotic birds covered by Convention
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in subsec. (d), was in the original “this Act” and was translated as reading “this title”, meaning title I of , known as the Wild Bird Conservation Act of 1992, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 102–440

children.heading: Establishment of moratorium
children.label: 1 Establishment of moratorium
children.text: The importation of any exotic bird of a species identified as a category B species in the report entitled “Report of the Animals Committee”, adopted by the 8th meeting of the Conference of the Parties to the Convention, is prohibited.

children.label: A
children.text: determines that appropriate remedial measures have been taken in the countries of origin for that species, so as to eliminate the threat of trade to the conservation of the species; and

children.label: B
children.text: makes the findings described in for the species and includes the species in the list published under .section 4905(c) of this titlesection 4905(a) of this title

children.heading: Emergency authority to suspend imports of listed species
children.label: b Emergency authority to suspend imports of listed species
i
children.text: trade in that species is detrimental to the species,

children.label: ii
children.text: there is not sufficient information available on which to base a judgment that the species is not detrimentally affected by trade in that species, or

children.label: iii
children.text: remedial measures have been recommended by the Standing Committee of the Convention that have not been implemented; and

children.label: B
children.text: the suspension might be necessary for the conservation of the species.

children.heading: Termination of suspension
children.label: 2 Termination of suspension
children.text: A species of exotic birds shall be subject to a suspension of importation under paragraph (1) until the Secretary, after notice and an opportunity for public comment, makes the findings described in and includes the species in the list published under .section 4905(c) of this titlesection 4905(a) of this title

children.heading: Moratorium after one year for other species listed in appendices
children.label: c Moratorium after one year for other species listed in appendices
children.text: Effective on the date that is one year after , the importation of any exotic bird of a species that is listed in any Appendix to the Convention is prohibited unless the Secretary makes the findings described in and includes the species in the list published under .October 23, 1992section 4905(c) of this titlesection 4905(a) of this title

children.heading: Limitation on number imported during first year
children.label: d Limitation on number imported during first year
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter, the Secretary shall prohibit the importation, during the 1-year period beginning on , of exotic birds of each species that is listed under any Appendix to the Convention in excess of the number of that species that were imported during the most recent year for which the Secretary has complete import data.October 23, 1992
